items.title: Trump says ceasefire is 'over' after US and Iran trade strikes
items.summary: Speaking ahead of a Nato summit, the president says US negotiators can keep talking with the Iranians "if they want".

items.title: US strikes target Iranian military boats
items.summary: The US has launched the strikes on Iran in response to attacks on three oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Will Le Pen rise again? French nationalist leader defiant after court's ruling
items.summary: Within hours of a court of appeal confirming a guilty verdict, Marine Le Pen had already launched her presidential campaign.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 中國渣男旅德迷姦還開「老司機」群組 爽分享影像甚至直播
items.summary: 數名旅居德國的中國籍男子多年來在多座德國城市迷姦華人女性，並藉通訊軟體Telegram群組傳播影像甚至直播，犯案者已相繼落網，近日則因審訊及判刑再掀關注。  綜合英國廣播公司（BBC）中...…

items.title: 日本知名繪本作家林明子過世 《第一次上街買東西》純真孩童永留人心
items.summary: 日本知名繪本家林明子，在今（8）日由福音館書店證實，已於7月1日因肺炎病逝，享壽81歲。林明子畫風溫潤、筆觸細膩，一生創作無數陪伴讀者長大的經典，其中《第一次上街買東西》...…

items.title: 烏軍無人機再建功！襲擊亞速海俄9油輪
items.summary: 烏克蘭軍方週三（8日）證實，烏軍無人機在夜間發動大規模襲擊，成功轟炸俄羅斯境內三座大型煉油廠、一處軍用機場，並重創亞速海上的俄羅斯油輪船隊，切斷克里米亞補給線。  據《路透》...…
